0.7.9.en: New: MQTT Bridge — publish motion/person/audio_alarm events to any MQTT broker; configurable prefix, TLS, auth; compatible with Node-RED, openHAB, HA, Frigate.
0.7.9.de: Neu: MQTT-Bridge — motion/person/audio_alarm Events an MQTT-Broker publishen; konfigurierbares Prefix, TLS, Auth; kompatibel mit Node-RED, openHAB, HA, Frigate.
0.7.9.ru: Новое: MQTT-мост — публикация событий motion/person/audio_alarm на любой MQTT-брокер; настраиваемый префикс, TLS, аутентификация; совместимо с Node-RED, openHAB, HA, Frigate.
0.7.9.pt: Novo: MQTT Bridge — publicar eventos motion/person/audio_alarm em qualquer broker MQTT; prefixo, TLS e auth configuráveis; compatível com Node-RED, openHAB, HA, Frigate.
0.7.9.nl: Nieuw: MQTT Bridge — motion/person/audio_alarm events naar elke MQTT broker sturen; configureerbaar prefix, TLS, auth; compatibel met Node-RED, openHAB, HA, Frigate.
0.7.9.fr: Nouveau: MQTT Bridge — publier les événements motion/person/audio_alarm sur n'importe quel broker MQTT; préfixe, TLS et auth configurables; compatible Node-RED, openHAB, HA, Frigate.
0.7.9.it: Nuovo: MQTT Bridge — pubblica eventi motion/person/audio_alarm su qualsiasi broker MQTT; prefisso, TLS e auth configurabili; compatibile con Node-RED, openHAB, HA, Frigate.
0.7.9.es: Nuevo: MQTT Bridge — publica eventos motion/person/audio_alarm en cualquier broker MQTT; prefijo, TLS y auth configurables; compatible con Node-RED, openHAB, HA, Frigate.
0.7.9.pl: Nowe: MQTT Bridge — publikuj zdarzenia motion/person/audio_alarm do dowolnego brokera MQTT; konfigurowalny prefix, TLS, auth; zgodny z Node-RED, openHAB, HA, Frigate.
0.7.9.uk: Нове: MQTT-міст — публікація подій motion/person/audio_alarm на будь-який MQTT-брокер; налаштовуваний префікс, TLS, аутентифікація; сумісно з Node-RED, openHAB, HA, Frigate.
0.7.9.zh-cn: 新增：MQTT Bridge — 将 motion/person/audio_alarm 事件推送到任意 MQTT Broker；可配置前缀、TLS、认证；兼容 Node-RED、openHAB、HA、Frigate。

0.7.8.en: Fix: Gen2 LAN-RCP writes no longer fail silently; emergency LiveSession auto-opens for Digest creds. New: PTZ presets for 360° indoor cam — pan_position + pan_preset DPs; home/left/right/back-left/back-right.
0.7.8.de: Fix: Gen2 LAN-RCP-Writes schlagen nicht mehr still fehl; Emergency-LiveSession öffnet sich für Digest-Creds. Neu: PTZ-Presets für 360°-Innenkamera — pan_position + pan_preset DPs; home/left/right/back-left/back-right.
0.7.8.ru: Fix: Gen2 LAN-RCP без тихих сбоев; аварийная LiveSession для Digest. Новое: PTZ-пресеты для 360° (Gen1) — pan_position + pan_preset DP; home/left/right/back-left/back-right.
0.7.8.pt: Fix: writes LAN-RCP Gen2 sem falhas silenciosas; LiveSession emergência para Digest. Novo: PTZ presets câmera 360° — pan_position + pan_preset DPs; home/left/right/back-left/back-right.
0.7.8.nl: Fix: Gen2 LAN-RCP writes niet meer stil falen; nood-LiveSession voor Digest. Nieuw: PTZ presets 360° cam — pan_position + pan_preset DPs; home/left/right/back-left/back-right.
0.7.8.fr: Fix: writes LAN-RCP Gen2 sans échec silencieux; LiveSession urgence pour Digest. Nouveau: PTZ presets caméra 360° — DPs pan_position + pan_preset; home/left/right/back-left/back-right.
0.7.8.it: Fix: write LAN-RCP Gen2 senza fail silenzioso; LiveSession emergenza per Digest. Nuovo: PTZ preset cam 360° — DP pan_position + pan_preset; home/left/right/back-left/back-right.
0.7.8.es: Fix: writes LAN-RCP Gen2 sin fallo silencioso; LiveSession emergencia para Digest. Nuevo: PTZ presets cam 360° — DPs pan_position + pan_preset; home/left/right/back-left/back-right.
0.7.8.pl: Fix: zapisy LAN-RCP Gen2 bez cichych błędów; awaryjnie LiveSession dla Digest. Nowe: PTZ presety 360° — DP pan_position + pan_preset; home/left/right/back-left/back-right.
0.7.8.uk: Fix: Gen2 LAN-RCP без тихих збоїв; аварійна LiveSession для Digest. Нове: PTZ пресети 360° (Gen1) — DP pan_position + pan_preset; home/left/right/back-left/back-right.
0.7.8.zh-cn: 修复：Gen2 LAN-RCP 不再静默失败；自动 LiveSession 获取 Digest 凭据。新增：360° 室内摄像头 PTZ 预设 — pan_position + pan_preset DP；home/left/right/back-left/back-right。

0.7.7.en: New: Gen2 audio (mic/speaker) + intrusion (sensitivity/distance) DPs; WiFi info DPs; configurable motion-active window.
0.7.7.de: Neu: Gen2 Audio (Mikrofon/Lautsprecher) + Intrusion (Empfindlichkeit/Distanz) DPs; WLAN-Info-DPs; konfigurierbares Motion-Active-Fenster.
0.7.7.ru: Новое: Gen2 аудио (микрофон/динамик) + вторжение (чувствительность/дистанция) DP; WiFi DP; настраиваемое окно motion-active.
0.7.7.pt: Novo: Gen2 DPs áudio (mic/altifalante) + intrusão (sensibilidade/distância); DPs WiFi; janela motion-active configurável.
0.7.7.nl: Nieuw: Gen2 audio (mic/luidspreker) + inbraak (gevoeligheid/afstand) DPs; WiFi DPs; instelbaar motion-active venster.
0.7.7.fr: Nouveau: Gen2 DPs audio (micro/haut-parleur) + intrusion (sensibilité/distance); DPs WiFi; fenêtre motion-active configurable.
0.7.7.it: Nuovo: Gen2 DP audio (mic/altoparlante) + intrusione (sensibilità/distanza); DP WiFi; finestra motion-active configurabile.
0.7.7.es: Nuevo: Gen2 DPs audio (mic/altavoz) + intrusión (sensibilidad/distancia); DPs WiFi; ventana motion-active configurable.
0.7.7.pl: Nowe: Gen2 DP audio (mik/głośnik) + wtargnięcie (czułość/odległość); DP WiFi; konfigurowalny czas motion-active.
0.7.7.uk: Нове: Gen2 DP аудіо (мікрофон/динамік) + вторгнення (чутливість/відстань); DP WiFi; налаштовуване вікно motion-active.
0.7.7.zh-cn: 新增：Gen2 音频 DP（麦克风/扬声器）+入侵检测 DP；WiFi 信息 DP；可配置 motion-active 窗口。

0.7.6.en: Fix: Indoor II (Gen2, no LEDs) no longer gets light DPs; handler writes blocked; orphaned DPs removed on restart.
0.7.6.de: Fix: Indoor II (Gen2, keine LEDs) erhält keine Licht-DPs; Handler-Writes geblockt; verwaiste DPs beim Neustart entfernt.
0.7.6.ru: Fix: Indoor II (Gen2, нет LED) не получает DP света; записи handler заблокированы; устарелые DP удаляются при перезапуске.
0.7.6.pt: Fix: Indoor II (Gen2, sem LED) não recebe DPs de luz; escritas bloqueadas; DPs obsoletos removidos no reinício.
0.7.6.nl: Fix: Indoor II (Gen2, geen LED) krijgt geen licht-DPs; handler-writes geblokkeerd; verouderde DPs bij herstart verwijderd.
0.7.6.fr: Correction: Indoor II (Gen2, sans LED) ne reçoit plus de DP lumière; écritures bloquées; DP obsolètes supprimés au redémarrage.
0.7.6.it: Fix: Indoor II (Gen2, senza LED) non riceve DP luce; scritture bloccate; DP obsoleti rimossi al riavvio.
0.7.6.es: Fix: Indoor II (Gen2, sin LED) no recibe DPs de luz; escritas bloqueadas; DPs obsoletos eliminados al reiniciar.
0.7.6.pl: Fix: Indoor II (Gen2, bez LED) nie dostaje DP świateł; zapisy zablokowane; przestarzałe DP usuwane przy restarcie.
0.7.6.uk: Виправлення: Indoor II (Gen2, без LED) не отримує DP світла; записи заблоковано; застарілі DP видаляються при перезапуску.
0.7.6.zh-cn: 修复：Indoor II（Gen2，无 LED）不再创建灯光 DP；写入被屏蔽；重启时清除遗留 DP。

0.7.5.en: Fix: local RCP fallback (privacy/light) now uses HTTPS port 443 + HTTP Digest auth; HTTP port 80 → connection refused on Gen2 cameras.
0.7.5.de: Fix: Lokaler RCP-Fallback (Privacy/Licht) nutzt jetzt HTTPS Port 443 + HTTP Digest Auth; HTTP Port 80 → Connection refused bei Gen2-Kameras.
0.7.5.ru: Исправление: локальный RCP-fallback (privacy/свет) теперь использует HTTPS порт 443 + HTTP Digest auth; HTTP порт 80 → connection refused на Gen2.
0.7.5.pt: Fix: fallback RCP local (privacy/luz) usa agora HTTPS porta 443 + HTTP Digest auth; HTTP porta 80 → connection refused em câmeras Gen2.
0.7.5.nl: Fix: lokale RCP-fallback (privacy/licht) gebruikt nu HTTPS poort 443 + HTTP Digest auth; HTTP poort 80 → connection refused op Gen2-camera's.
0.7.5.fr: Correction : le fallback RCP local (privacy/lumière) utilise désormais HTTPS port 443 + HTTP Digest auth ; HTTP port 80 → connection refused sur Gen2.
0.7.5.it: Fix: il fallback RCP locale (privacy/luce) usa ora HTTPS porta 443 + HTTP Digest auth; HTTP porta 80 → connection refused su Gen2.
0.7.5.es: Fix: el fallback RCP local (privacy/luz) usa ahora HTTPS puerto 443 + HTTP Digest auth; HTTP puerto 80 → connection refused en Gen2.
0.7.5.pl: Fix: lokalny fallback RCP (privacy/światło) używa teraz HTTPS port 443 + HTTP Digest auth; HTTP port 80 → connection refused na Gen2.
0.7.5.uk: Виправлення: локальний RCP-fallback (privacy/світло) тепер використовує HTTPS порт 443 + HTTP Digest auth; HTTP порт 80 → connection refused на Gen2.
0.7.5.zh-cn: 修复：本地 RCP 回退（隐私/灯光）现在使用 HTTPS 443 端口 + HTTP Digest 认证；HTTP 80 端口在 Gen2 摄像头上 connection refused。

0.7.4.en: LAN-fallback: outage-ping sweep on cloud 5xx; cameras.<id>.lan_ip + lan_reachable DPs; 30 s post-write grace; cloud-degraded startup rehydrates from object DB; front-light local RCP fallback (Gen2) on cloud failure; privacy local RCP fallback.
0.7.4.de: LAN-Fallback: Outage-Ping bei Cloud-5xx; cameras.<id>.lan_ip + lan_reachable DPs; 30 s Post-Write-Grace; Cloud-degradierter Start rehydriert aus Object-DB; Front-Licht lokaler RCP-Fallback (Gen2) bei Cloud-Ausfall; Privacy lokaler RCP-Fallback.
0.7.4.ru: LAN-fallback: пинг при 5xx от облака; cameras.<id>.lan_ip + lan_reachable; 30 с grace после записи; запуск при недоступном облаке из object DB; локальный RCP fallback front-light (Gen2); локальный RCP fallback privacy.
0.7.4.pt: LAN-fallback: ping de outage em 5xx cloud; DPs cameras.<id>.lan_ip + lan_reachable; grace 30 s pós-escrita; startup degradado rehydrata do object DB; fallback RCP local front-light (Gen2); fallback RCP local privacy.
0.7.4.nl: LAN-fallback: outage-ping bij cloud 5xx; cameras.<id>.lan_ip + lan_reachable DPs; 30 s post-write grace; cloud-degraded start herlaadt uit object DB; front-light lokale RCP fallback (Gen2); privacy lokale RCP fallback.
0.7.4.fr: LAN-fallback: ping outage sur 5xx cloud; DPs cameras.<id>.lan_ip + lan_reachable; grace 30 s post-écriture; démarrage dégradé recharge depuis object DB; fallback RCP local front-light (Gen2); fallback RCP local privacy.
0.7.4.it: LAN-fallback: ping outage su 5xx cloud; DP cameras.<id>.lan_ip + lan_reachable; grace 30 s post-scrittura; avvio degradato ricarica da object DB; fallback RCP locale front-light (Gen2); fallback RCP locale privacy.
0.7.4.es: LAN-fallback: ping outage en 5xx cloud; DPs cameras.<id>.lan_ip + lan_reachable; grace 30 s post-escritura; inicio degradado rehidrata desde object DB; fallback RCP local front-light (Gen2); fallback RCP local privacy.
0.7.4.pl: LAN-fallback: ping outage przy 5xx cloud; DP cameras.<id>.lan_ip + lan_reachable; 30 s grace po zapisie; zdegradowany start rehydruje z object DB; lokalny fallback RCP front-light (Gen2); lokalny fallback RCP privacy.
0.7.4.uk: LAN-fallback: ping outage при 5xx хмари; DP cameras.<id>.lan_ip + lan_reachable; grace 30 с після запису; деградований старт перезавантажує з object DB; локальний RCP fallback front-light (Gen2); локальний RCP fallback privacy.
0.7.4.zh-cn: LAN 回退：云端 5xx 时执行 outage-ping；cameras.<id>.lan_ip + lan_reachable 状态；写入后 30 秒 grace 期；云端降级启动从 object DB 恢复；Gen2 前灯本地 RCP 回退；隐私模式本地 RCP 回退。

common.name: Encrypted Bosch SingleKey ID access token (AES via ioBroker system secret — never plaintext from v0.6.0)
Encrypted Bosch SingleKey ID refresh token (AES via ioBroker system secret — never plaintext from v0.6.0)
Persisted FCM credentials (ECDH key + ACG creds) so a restart does not re-register against Bosch CBS / Google FCM
FCM push listener status: healthy / stub / error / stopped
